name_cn:
Style: 1030
💫N/S Klassik Visetos💫Crossbody Bag
As its name suggests, this Klassik crossbody bag is a mainstay for creating stylish looks. Made of classic Visetos material and trimmed with Nappa leather, it is designed for ✨MCM✨ fans.
Size: approx. 22.5 x 17.0 x 7.0 cm
 Strap length is 79 to 144 cm
